name: Talking Tom Cat
description: The original talk-back app where Tom repeats what you say and reacts to touch.
controversy_description: Talking Tom Cat was the subject of viral rumors claiming it spied on children and collected dangerous data, but these claims were debunked and no evidence of such behavior was found.

name: Talking Baby Hippo
description: A cute baby hippo that repeats your voice and reacts to user interactions.

name: Talking Larry the Bird
description: Larry the Bird whistles, repeats your voice, and reacts to taps and pokes.

name: Talking Harry the Hedgehog
description: Harry the Hedgehog repeats your voice, performs magic tricks, and reacts to user interactions.
controversy_description: Harry's headband originally featured a symbol resembling the Rising Sun Flag. After complaints, Outfit7 removed the symbol from the iOS version in 2012, but the Android version never received the update.

name: Talking Roby the Robot
description: Roby the Robot repeats your voice in a robotic tone and reacts to user input.

name: Talking Rex the Dinosaur
description: Rex the Dinosaur repeats your voice and reacts with roars and animations.

name: Talking Santa
description: A festive talk-back app where Santa repeats your voice and interacts with Tom.

name: Talking Bacteria John, John and John
description: Three bacteria named John repeat your voice and react with chaotic animations.

name: Talking Gina the Giraffe
description: Gina the Giraffe repeats your voice and can be cared for with mini-activities.

name: Talking Lila the Fairy
description: Lila the Fairy repeats your voice and performs magical animations.

name: Talking Ben the Dog
description: Ben the Dog repeats your voice and interacts with lab equipment and objects.

name: Talking Tom Cat 2
description: A sequel to Talking Tom Cat with new animations, environments, and interactions.

name: Talking Pierre the Parrot
description: Pierre the Parrot repeats your voice and reacts with mischievous behavior.

name: Talking Tom & Ben News
description: Tom and Ben host a parody news show where you can insert your own content and voice.

name: Talking Santa Meets Ginger (Android)
description: A holiday crossover app featuring Santa and Ginger interacting in festive scenes.

name: Tom's Love Letters
description: Tom and Angela exchange romantic animations and messages that users can customize and share.

name: Talking Santa Meets Ginger (iOS)
description: The iOS-specific version of the Santa and Ginger crossover app.

name: Tom's Messenger
description: An app for sending short video messages featuring Talking Tom repeating your recorded text.

name: Tom Loves Angela
description: Tom tries to impress Angela on a rooftop, with interactive dialogue and animations.

name: Talking Ginger
description: Ginger repeats your voice and features bedtime-themed mini-games like brushing teeth and showering.

name: Talking Friends Superstars
description: A companion app for the physical Talking Friends Superstar toys, letting them interact with the app.

name: I Want To Be Big!
description: An interactive storybook app featuring Talking Friends characters and a growth-themed narrative.

name: Talking Angela
description: Angela sits at a café in Paris, responding to user input with chat, gestures, and talk-back features.
controversy_description: Talking Angela was the subject of widespread online rumors claiming the app contained a predator in Angela's eyes and asked children for personal data. These claims were debunked, but the rumors caused moral panic and led to media coverage and parental concern.

name: My Learn Go
description: An educational spin-off using Talking Tom characters to teach basic concepts, likely region-limited and hardware/partner specific.

name: Angela's Valentine
description: A Valentine-themed app featuring Tom and Angela in romantic animated scenes users can share.

name: Talking Friends Cartoons
description: An app hub for the Talking Friends animated cartoon episodes and related content.
controversy_description: Talking Friends Cartoons was criticized for hosting age-inappropriate in-app advertisements, including a promotion by Yamoja that led users to a subscription-based 'win a 64GB iPad' quiz. After backlash, CEO Samo Login apologized and stated the ads were the result of an ad network glitch, and the offending ads were removed.

name: Talking Ginger 2
description: A birthday-themed sequel where Ginger celebrates with cake, candles, and new mini-games.

name: Talking Ginger 2 CHN
description: The Chinese-region version of Talking Ginger 2, localized for the CHN market.

name: My Talking Tom
description: A virtual pet game where players adopt, feed, dress, and play mini-games with Tom as he grows.
controversy_description: In 2015, the UK Advertising Standards Authority ruled that an age-inappropriate adult-service advertisement had been shown to a child within My Talking Tom. The ASA noted that Outfit7 had strict advertising policies but could not identify which ad network served the ad; the incident led to scrutiny of ad network controls in children’s apps.

name: My Talking Tom CHN
description: The Chinese-region version of My Talking Tom, localized and distributed via regional app stores.

name: My Talking Angela
description: A virtual pet game focused on Angela, with dress-up, mini-games, and home customization.
controversy_description: My Talking Angela was occasionally mentioned alongside older Talking Angela rumors, but there is no confirmed major controversy specific to this title. None.

name: My Talking Angela CHN
description: The Chinese-region localized version of My Talking Angela.

name: Talking Tom For Messenger
description: A companion app that let users send Talking Tom video clips and stickers through messaging platforms.

name: Talking Tom Jetski
description: An endless runner-style game where Tom rides a jetski, dodging obstacles and collecting coins.

name: Talking Tom Run
description: An early endless runner featuring Talking Tom, likely a lighter or experimental release.

name: Talking Tom Bubble Shooter
description: A bubble-shooting puzzle game starring Talking Tom and friends.

name: Talking Tom AR Learning Software
description: A Chinese-region augmented reality educational app using Talking Tom characters for learning activities.

name: Talking Tom Cat (2016)
description: A refreshed version of the original Talking Tom Cat with updated visuals and features.

name: Talking Tom Gold Run
description: An endless runner where Tom and friends chase a robber, build homes, and unlock characters.

name: Talking Tom Gold Run CHN
description: The Chinese-region version of Talking Tom Gold Run with localized content and distribution.

name: Tom's 3Dcards
description: An app that brought physical 3D cards featuring Talking Tom characters to life using augmented reality.

name: My Talking Hank
description: A virtual pet game starring Hank on a tropical island, focused on photography and animal visitors.

name: My Talking Hank CHN
description: The Chinese-region localized version of My Talking Hank.

name: Talking Tom Camp
description: A base-building and water-fight strategy game featuring Talking Tom and friends at summer camp.

name: Talking Angela Color Splash
description: A coloring and creativity app centered on Angela and artistic activities.

name: Talking Angela Color Splash CHN
description: The Chinese-region version of Talking Angela Color Splash.

name: Talking Tom Pool
description: A puzzle game where players clear pool levels by bouncing characters off inflatable floats.

name: Talking Tom Candy Run
description: An endless runner where Tom and friends chase a candy thief through colorful environments.

name: Talking Tom Adventure (2018)
description: A Chinese-region adventure-style game featuring Talking Tom, released around 2018.

name: Talking Tom Jetski 2
description: A sequel to Talking Tom Jetski with expanded tracks, characters, and customization.

name: Animal Run
description: A Chinese-region endless runner featuring animal characters, associated with the Talking Tom brand.

name: My Talking Tom Lite
description: A lighter, limited version of My Talking Tom with reduced features for lower-end devices.

name: Talking Tom Cake Jump
description: An arcade-style jumping game where Tom bounces between cakes and platforms.

name: Talking Tom Jump Up
description: A vertical jumping game where Tom climbs higher by bouncing on platforms.

name: My Talking Tom 2
description: A sequel to My Talking Tom with expanded mini-games, travel, and more detailed pet care.

name: My Talking Tom 2 CHN
description: The Chinese-region localized version of My Talking Tom 2.

name: Talking Tom Farts
description: A small gag app focused on humorous fart sound effects with Talking Tom.

name: Talking Angela Dress Up
description: A dress-up focused Angela app with outfits and styling options.

name: Talking Angela Dress Up CHN
description: The Chinese-region version of Talking Angela Dress Up.

name: Talking Tom Fun Fair
description: A fairground-themed game with Talking Tom and mini attractions.

name: Talking Tom Fun Fair CHN
description: The Chinese-region localized version of Talking Tom Fun Fair.

name: Talking Tom Coding Planet
description: A Chinese-exclusive educational app teaching coding concepts using Talking Tom characters.

name: Talking Tom Hero Dash
description: A superhero-themed endless runner where Tom and friends fight raccoon villains and rebuild the city.

name: Talking Tom Hero Dash CHN
description: The Chinese-region version of Talking Tom Hero Dash.

name: Talking Tom Splash Force
description: A water-fight puzzle game where Tom and friends battle raccoons using water cannons.

name: Talking Tom Karting
description: A Chinese-region kart racing game featuring Talking Tom characters.

name: Talking Tom Squad
description: A Chinese-region team-based action or puzzle game featuring Talking Tom and friends.

name: Talking Tom Sky Run
description: An aerial-themed endless runner where Tom and friends fly and glide through the sky.

name: Talking Tom Adventure (2020)
description: A later Chinese-region adventure game featuring Talking Tom, distinct from the 2018 title.

name: My Talking Tom Friends
description: A shared-house virtual pet game where players care for Tom and all his friends together.

name: My Talking Tom Friends CHN
description: The Chinese-region version of My Talking Tom Friends.
controversy_description: A texture loading error in the Chinese version caused Ginger’s face to distort, resulting in extremely squinted eyes. Some players felt the glitch resembled offensive racial caricatures, but it was the result of a technical texture bug rather than intentional design.

name: Talking Tom English Paradise
description: An Android-only educational app using Talking Tom to teach English vocabulary and phrases.

name: Talking Tom Bubble Warrior
description: A Chinese-region bubble-shooting action game featuring Talking Tom as a warrior.

name: Talking Tom Little Fighter
description: A Chinese-region fighting or brawler-style game starring a chibi version of Talking Tom.

name: Talking Tom Bubbles
description: A Chinese-region bubble-based puzzle or arcade game with Talking Tom.

name: Talking Tom Blast Park
description: An Apple Arcade game where Tom and friends blast through theme park-style levels.

name: Talking Tom Wild Party
description: A Chinese-region party-themed game featuring Talking Tom and friends.

name: Talking Tom Ultra Kart
description: A Chinese-region high-speed kart racing game with Talking Tom characters.

name: Talking Tom Little Warrior
description: Another Chinese-region warrior-themed game featuring a small stylized Talking Tom.

name: My Talking Angela 2
description: A sequel to My Talking Angela with expanded activities, travel, music, and mini-games.

name: My Talking Angela 2 CHN
description: The Chinese-region localized version of My Talking Angela 2.

name: GameBud Talking Tom
description: A companion app for the GameBud Talking Tom interactive toy, syncing in-game and toy reactions.

name: Talking Tom Time Rush
description: An endless runner where Tom and friends travel through time-themed worlds.

name: My Talking Tom+
description: An Apple Arcade enhanced version of My Talking Tom with no ads or in-app purchases.

name: Talking Ginger Coloring
description: A coloring and creativity app centered on Ginger and simple art activities.

name: Talking Ben AI
description: An AI-enhanced version of Talking Ben with more dynamic responses and interactions.

name: My Talking Angela 2+
description: An Apple Arcade enhanced version of My Talking Angela 2 without ads or in-app purchases.

name: My Talking Hank Islands
description: A follow-up to My Talking Hank with expanded island exploration and animal photography.

name: Talking Ginger Playground
description: A playground-themed game featuring Ginger with mini-games and interactive toys.

name: My Talking Tom 2 Lite
description: A lighter version of My Talking Tom 2 optimized for lower-end devices.

name: Talking Tom & Friends World
description: A world-building and adventure game uniting the Talking Tom & Friends cast in a shared universe.

name: Talking Tom & Friends 2
description: A sequel expanding the Talking Tom & Friends universe with new stories and gameplay.

name: Talking Tom Cat (2025)
description: A modern reimagining of the original Talking Tom Cat for new devices and audiences.

name: My Talking Tom Friends+
description: An Apple Arcade enhanced version of My Talking Tom Friends with premium features and no ads.

name: Talking Tom Hole Quest
description: An upcoming game where Tom and friends explore mysterious holes and worlds.

name: My Talking Tom 2+
description: An Apple Arcade enhanced version of My Talking Tom 2 with no ads or in-app purchases.

name: Seek & Find with Talking Tom
description: A hidden-object style game where players search for items with Talking Tom.

name: Talking Angela: Room Decor
description: A decorating-focused game where players design Angela’s room and interior spaces.

name: Talking Tom Epic Ride
description: An upcoming action or runner game centered on Tom’s high-speed epic rides.
